features.title: Data adapter (toKLineData) + KLineChart dark theme (klineTheme.ts)
features.description: Create src/chart/dataAdapter.ts and src/theme/klineTheme.ts per plan Task 1

features.title: KLineChartWrapper core component with multi-pane layout
features.description: Create src/components/chart/KLineChartWrapper.tsx per plan Task 2. Single init() with MA, VOL, MACD panes.

features.title: Overlay mapping + custom overlay registrations (20 overlays)
features.description: Create src/chart/overlayMapping.ts and src/chart/customOverlays.ts per plan Task 3

features.title: Custom indicators (FSL, MOST, ASI, BRAR) registration
Rewrite ChartContainer for KLineChartWrapper integration
features.description: Rewrite src/components/chart/ChartContainer.tsx per plan Task 5. Remove LW Charts refs, use single KLineChartWrapper.

features.title: Adapt useKeyboardShortcuts for KLineChart API
features.description: Rewrite src/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts per plan Task 6. Use scrollToDataIndex, zoomAtCoordinate, executeAction.

features.title: Register custom code at app entry (main.tsx)
features.description: Add registerCustomIndicators() and registerCustomOverlays() to src/main.tsx per plan Task 7

features.title: Simplify crosshairStore for native KLineChart crosshair
features.description: Rewrite src/stores/crosshairStore.ts per plan Task 8. Keep only activeBarIndex + isKeyboardNavMode.

features.title: Delete old LW Charts files (9 files) + fix imports
features.description: Delete KLineChart.tsx, VolumeChart.tsx, Crosshair.tsx, InfoTooltip.tsx, useCrosshairSync.ts, useWheelZoom.ts, useChartSync.ts, darkTheme.ts, indicator.worker.ts. Fix remaining imports.

features.title: DrawingCanvas -> DrawingBridge (overlay sync bridge)
features.description: Create DrawingBridge.tsx to sync drawingStore with KLineChart overlays. Delete DrawingCanvas.tsx (1315 lines).

features.title: BacktestResult equity curve migration to KLineChart
features.description: Replace D3 equity curve in BacktestResult.tsx with KLineChart instance per plan Task 11

features.title: Delete IndicatorChart.tsx + move FormulaSeries type
features.description: Move FormulaSeries to src/types/chart.ts, delete IndicatorChart.tsx, wire IndicatorParamsDialog to KLineChart

features.title: Update DrawingContextMenu for KLineChart overlay API
features.description: Wire lock/unlock to chart.overrideOverlay() per plan Task 13

features.title: Remove lightweight-charts dependency
features.description: npm uninstall lightweight-charts, fix all remaining imports, verify typecheck passes

features.title: Version bump to 0.4.0
features.description: Update version in package.json, Cargo.toml, tauri.conf.json from 0.3.1 to 0.4.0

features.title: DataLoader integration for lazy loading
features.description: Wire dataStore fetch functions to KLineChart DataLoader API in KLineChartWrapper per plan Task 16

features.title: Final gate: typecheck passes, no lightweight-charts references remain
features.description: Verify: npm run typecheck passes, grep -r lightweight-charts src/ returns nothing, all features preserved
